summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a special meeting to correct a resolution related to a fire and EMS tax levy. The board rescinded resolution R-013-2024, which contained typos identified by both township staff and the prosecutor's office, and adopted a corrected replacement resolution R-015-2024 for a 4.4 mil fire and emergency services tax levy.
decisions: Rescinded resolution R-013-2024 (4.4 mil fire/EMS levy resolution with typos, originally adopted July 16, 2024)
Approved resolution R-015-2024 (corrected 4.4 mil fire and emergency services tax levy resolution to proceed)
key_amounts: 4.4 mil fire and emergency services tax levy
notable_topics: Rescinding and replacing fire/EMS levy resolution due to typos
4.4 mil fire and emergency services tax levy
notes: The meeting was very brief, lasting approximately 2 minutes (3:30 to 3:32 PM). The trustee's last name appears inconsistently in the transcript as Howelson, Howden, Hauserman, and Howland, likely referring to the same individual.
title: Special BOT 7-19-24
